description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical shape and a wide, hexagonal base for stability. The cone is primarily orange with two broad white bands encircling its midsection, both of which appear to be reflective for increased visibility. The surface shows signs of wear, with visible dirt and scuff marks, especially near the base, indicating outdoor use. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the cone. The base is flat, slightly textured, and appears to be made of a heavier material to prevent tipping. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two white reflective bands and a wide, stable base, showing visible dirt and scuff marks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white bands and noticeable dirt at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the reflective bands and more pronounced scuffing near the bottom edge.
description_view_2: Another side view with the white bands and base dirt visible, but less scuffing than other views.
description_view_3: Rear view with the orange cone, white bands, and the most visible dirt and wear at the base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the middle and one closer to the base.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, hexagonal, flat, and slightly textured, appearing thicker and heavier than the cone for stability.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks and dirt accumulation, especially near the base.
